warning_and_ban_system_explanation: GazaGo issues warning and ban cards to ensure fairness in exercise and challenges.
system_purpose: We operate a warning & ban card system to protect members who exercise diligently and earnestly.
card_issuance_process: Cards are issued after final review by the administrators.
warning_card_issuance_criteria: Warning cards may be issued in the following cases.
warning_card_criteria_irregular_movement: If the exercise radius or route is abnormal.
warning_card_criteria_example: ex) Repeatedly in the same place, or only turning it on at the starting point of exercise.
ban_card_issuance_criteria: Ban cards may be issued in the following cases.
ban_card_criteria_multiple_logins: Logging in to one account from multiple devices.
ban_card_criteria_simultaneous_logins: One person exercising simultaneously from multiple devices.
ban_card_criteria_example: ex) Consistent identical exercise routes, etc.
ban_card_criteria_gps_manipulation: Intentional GPS manipulation or use of tools for step count manipulation.
ban_card_criteria_other: Cards may also be issued in the following cases.
ban_card_criteria_fairness_concerns: If a user is suspected of unfairness by multiple members and the company deems the suspicion reasonable, a warning or ban card may be issued depending on the circumstances.
ban_card_criteria_service_disruption_exa: ex) Spreading false information or causing confusion to other users about unverified information or engaging in acts that disrupt service operation. Service usage restriction.
ban_card_criteria_service_error_abuse_ex: ex) Affecting the ecosystem with benefits from service errors. Warning or ban card issuance depending on intent.
ban_card_criteria_fraudulent_transaction: Fraudulent transactions. Acquiring & transferring/selling abnormal accounts.
ban_card_criteria_personal_information_l: Personal information leakage. Disclosing other users' personal information without consent.
card_penalties: The following penalties will be imposed if you receive a warning or ban card.
warning_card_penalty_go_reset: Reset of GO earned on the day
warning_card_penalty_service_restriction: 30-day service restriction - only applies if it interferes with service operation
ban_card_penalty_reward_confiscation: Confiscation and expiration of rewards such as TIK, STIK, and gift certificates.
terms_change_notice: The above content may be changed without prior notice depending on operating circumstances.
cards_issued_to_all_accounts: Cards will be issued to all related accounts.
warning_ejection_records_permanent: Warning and ejection card records will not be deleted.
cooperation_for_fair_play: We appreciate your cooperation to ensure fair and clean GazaGo activities.
corporate_challenge_requires_employee_id: Corporate challenges require employee ID entry to participate.
